title: Find My Device - Allow Once - IOS [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device "Allow Once" location permission flow does not display expected permission prompt options on Android
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset connected.
2. On the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
3. Tap "Find My Device" from the menu.
4. When the location permission prompt appears, tap "Allow Once".
5. Tap the back button to return to the previous screen.
expected: The Location permission prompt appears with three options: "Allow Once", "Allow while using the app", and "Don't allow". After tapping "Allow Once", the Location and Geo icons become visible on the Find My Device screen.
